message:
refactor(robot): consolidate snapshot attention into robot.go, delete anchor file

Complete the 3-step type consolidation started in prior commits:
- SnapshotAttentionSummary/Item types already in attention_contract.go
- buildSnapshotAttentionSummary() now rewritten directly in robot.go

Delete internal/robot/snapshot_attention.go — the anchor file is no
longer needed since all its content has been relocated.

Rewrite buildSnapshotAttentionSummary() in robot.go:
- Use feed.Replay(oldestCursor-1, stats.Count) respecting replay window
  boundaries instead of hardcoded Replay(0, 1000)
- TotalEvents uses stats.Count (authoritative) not len(events)
- Initialize all fields to non-nil empty slices/maps for cleaner JSON
- Handle replay errors gracefully (return snapshot with resync next-step)
- Track actionRequired and interesting events separately
- Tiered next-step generation: (1) propagate event-level NextActions,
  (2) fallback to robot-events with since-cursor, (3) digest handoff
  for interesting-only, (4) always include follow-cursor and resync
  hint, capped at 3 steps
- Empty-feed returns attentionStatusNextAction + resync hint

Add cross-reference NOTE in attention_feed.go pointing to events.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
